This family consists of flowering plants that are predominantly found in the Northern Hemisphere. The Ericaceae family includes various genera, such as Erica, Rhododendron, and Vaccinium, and is known for its diverse range of species. These plants often thrive in acidic soils and are commonly found in heathlands and moorlands.
